content: You appear to be stuck on [STAY DOCKED. Try crafting analysis again since it failed last time with 0 ticks consumed. Check basic_crafting L8 recipes. Report which items have positive margins. Also check if any recipes use aluminum_ore or iridium_ore as ingredients — I had those before selling.
